name: R-3 react detectors: every R-3 detector honors the --paths flag per the §2.2 detector contract
command: for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do grep -q -- '--paths' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo all_paths 1>&2
